programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: Choocha, Hunny, Laali and the scheming Bholi Punjaban are constantly up to no good.

programme.title: Bhootnagar Mein Gadbad
programme.desc: Bringing the best in cinema.

programme.title: Titoo ki Vampirepanti
programme.desc: A scientist tries to avenge his daughter's suffering by kidnapping an infant vampire.

programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S14E17.

programme.title: Caring Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean is forced to care for the injured Mrs Wicket but her demands become troublesome. S02E24.

programme.title: Opera Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean is mistaken for a celebrity while going to the opera. S02E25.

programme.title: Taxi Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean ends up becoming a taxi driver when he heads out to buy a toy car. S02E26.

programme.title: Muscle Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean needs to impress Irma, who is infatuated with the hunky delivery man. S02E27.

programme.title: A New Friend-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: The seagull in the flat is actually a cuckoo in the nest taking over Bean's home. S02E28.

programme.title: The Lift-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean gets himself caught in a lift and he starts to annoy the other passengers. S02E29.
